hero.title:
CONSOLE DE COMMANDE
LOCALISATION UCS
hero.tag: Analyser · comparer · fusionner les fichiers .ucs de Company of Heroes. UTF-16-LE, BOM FF FE, CRLF, id→texte — on parle couramment.

msg.no_matches: Aucune correspondance — essayez regex ou cherchez les lacunes $id No Key.

hero.tag_html: Analyser · comparer · fusionner les fichiers .ucs de Company of Heroes. UTF-16-LE, BOM FF FE, CRLF, id→texte — on parle couramment.
hero.badge.bom_tip: Every UCS file starts with the 2-byte little-endian byte-order mark FF FE.
hero.badge.tab_tip: Values are everything after the FIRST tab — they may legally contain more tabs.
hero.badge.nkey_tip: When the engine can't resolve an id it renders '$id No Key' in-game.
hero.badge.comments_tip: The format has no comment syntax. Anything that isn't id→text is invalid.
footer.stack: coh-ucs-tools · FastAPI + vanilla JS · no build step

route.campaigns.sub: Approximate CoH1 id namespaces — use with patch builder / search.
route.games.sub: CoH1 / CoH2 / Dawn of War UCS dialect hints.
route.sga.sub: Scan install archives; list internals; extract locale .ucs files.
route.verify.sub: Known-bad IDs (559200, 9419700, ToV menus) — run before installing in-game.
route.translation.sub: Export for CAT tools (gettext PO, TMX 1.4); import translations back to UCS.

route.compare.sub: Coverage percentages and missing-id ranges both ways.

misc.hybrid_ui: Hybrid UI (GitHub Pages + Fly API): use the API key field below for uploads and merges. Browser cookies and OAuth sign-in only work on the same-origin monolith (fly.dev or localhost).
misc.api_key_storage: Stored in this browser only (localStorage). Public API may rate-limit by IP (~30 req/min, stricter on uploads).

banner.hybrid_title: Public API — no bundled game files.
banner.hybrid_body: This Fly.io host does not ship copyrighted .ucs files. Built-in version cards appear only when files exist on the server disk.
banner.hybrid_or: or run the CLI locally with your game install paths.
banner.french_title: French UCS not on this server.
banner.french_body: CoH1 had an official French release — recover RelicCOH.French.ucs from Steam depot 4565 (Legacy Edition) via DepotDownloader, save as downloads/RelicCOH.French.NSV.ucs, then run python build_french.py locally. See README § French localization.
about.sub: Open-source toolkit for Company of Heroes modders, translators, and archivists working with Relic .ucs localization files.
about.lead1: CoH UCS Tools helps you hunt down missing string ids — the ones that show up in-game as $559200 No Key in Tales of Valor menus or other broken UI text. Upload any RelicCOH.English.ucs / RelicCOH.Russian.ucs locale file, validate encoding and line format, compare coverage against another version, and merge missing ids safely.
about.lead2: The web console and REST API share the same Python parser used by the CLI — UTF-16-LE, FF FE BOM, CRLF endings, tab-separated id→text rows, no comments.
about.feature_upload: Upload & analyze — BOM detection, duplicate ids, invalid lines, entry browser
about.feature_compare: Compare two files — coverage % and missing-id ranges both ways
about.feature_merge: Merge wizard — graft missing ids with placeholders or verbatim copy
about.feature_validator: Validator — full UCS format checklist before shipping a mod
about.feature_translation: PO / TMX export — gettext and TMX interchange for CAT tools
about.feature_languages: Languages hub — known CoH1 retail and community locale versions
about.who_body: Complete Edition owners fixing broken menus, localization researchers recovering official English text, French/German/Spanish community patch authors, and developers wiring CI against the REST API.
faq.0.q: What is a Company of Heroes UCS file?
faq.0.a: UCS files are Relic's UTF-16-LE localization tables. Each line is numeric_id<TAB>text with a FF FE byte-order mark, CRLF line endings, and no comment syntax.
faq.1.q: Why do I see $559200 No Key in-game?
faq.1.a: The CoH engine renders $id No Key when a localization id exists in the scenario but is missing from the active .ucs file. CoH UCS Tools finds those gaps by comparing versions.
faq.2.q: Can this tool invent missing translations?
faq.2.a: No. Merge modes only copy existing text or insert <MISSING> placeholders — original uploads are never modified in place.
faq.3.q: Does the web app modify my game files?
faq.3.a: No. Uploads are stored on the server (or locally in dev). Merge and patch operations produce new downloadable files; install scripts only copy when you run them.
faq.4.q: Does it work with Tales of Valor and Opposing Fronts?
faq.4.a: Yes. Upload any CoH1 RelicCOH.*.ucs locale file; the validator checks encoding, duplicates, and line format regardless of campaign or expansion.
faq.5.q: Is there an API for automation?
faq.5.a: Yes. The same parser and merge logic runs as a REST API on Fly.io with OpenAPI docs at /docs.
